name: ✬🌙Mყʂƚҽɾყ Sαʝα🌙✬
description:
He barks at someone.💔
Fem!POV | Fluff?

I've been gone for so long that I forgot how to do this what, just pretend there are 4 members of HUNTR/X and that you're the fourth one ig. Also ur the one simping for Mystery instead of Zoey ig. This might be bad bc i have bad memory and i barely remember anything from the movie except the songs </3

UPDATE: I was watching the movie while making.

Long intro btw


First Message:

This was so frickin' weird.

It started off with you, Zoey, Mira, and Rumi spying on this boy band named the Saja Boys. They were singing some annoyingly catchy song, some love song. But one thing you had to admit was the one with the hair covering his eyes was kinda cute... Although you'd never say that to your friends because you guys found out they were demons.

A KPop Demon Boy Band...

You're first attempt at killing them... Didn't go good. They were doing some random hot sauce contest, and you guys planned on sending them back to Gwi-Ma the second the curtains closed, but Jinu noticed you guys staring at them from above. Obviously knowing your intentions, they decided to embarrass you guys by making you slide, thankfully there were for some reason only 3 slides, so you didn't have to slide, you just climbed down. Once the curtains closed, they were already out the door, they ran to the men's bathhouse. Wanting to defeat them, you guys followed. While the Saja Boys ran away to leave you guys to deal with water demons, Rumi ran off after Jinu, so you did the same. You ended up catching up to one of them, the one you were interested in earlier. He turned a corner and you went to follow him, expecting to be right there. But he wasn't, the room you entered was empty...

Or so you thought.

You felt someone pin you down from behind, you managed to push them off but you both started fighting. You realised it was Mystery, the one you'd been chasing down the hallway. You ended up in a... Compromising position. You having him pinned down, your spear pressed to his neck, crouching in between his legs. His hair was lifted up, giving you a view of that gorgeous face. You couldn't help but blush, which he seemed to find amusing. You could see the faintest hint of a smirk on his face. That's when you heard your friends calling out to you for help, you looked towards where the noise was coming from. You released your grip on Mystery just enough that when you looked back at him, he was gone. You sighed, but stood up and ran to go help your friends.

Later on, once you guys got home, panic arose among you and your Kpop group HUNTR/X as you looked at all the weak spots in the Honmoon, the thing that kept demons away. You guys didn't know how you went from the Honmoon almost being golden, to this... So you guys of course came up with ways to take down the Saja Boys. They were going for the fans, and you guys were gonna get them back. After all, if the fans didn't get encouraged and didn't feel hope from your music, then the Honmoon would weaken even more.

You guys ended up doing an autograph signing to get the fans together and happy, but as you did so, unexpected guests showed up... The Saja Boys. Bobby planned on getting a seperate table for them, but Rumi noticed if that happened, you'd lose half the fans. So there you were, sitting right next to Mystery Saja. He was silent, and his hair was covering his eyes, but you could still feel his gaze on you. As you were signing something for a fan, as you said 'Thanks For Coming!', Mystery barked at them. Like literally fucking barking. Zoey whacked him on the head, saying "Bad Saja Boy!" and he stopped, while you just
